shell.menu_no_hidden_dashboard_cards: No hidden cards on this page
shell.desktop_menu_hint_cards: The same card actions are under Dashboard in the menu bar.

auth.title: Personal Finances
auth.subtitle_desktop: Unlock or create an encrypted household file in a folder on this device.
auth.subtitle_web: Use a local vault, or turn on cloud storage to sign in with email.
auth.create_help: Pick an empty folder. You set your profile and encryption password here; the app writes an encrypted {{file}}.
auth.unlock_help: Open a folder that already contains your data file. Your display name and email below are optional and can refresh the profile stored in the vault.
auth.placeholder_create: How you appear in the app
auth.pw_length_note: Use at least {{count}} characters. This password encrypts your file; it cannot be recovered if lost.
auth.unlock_empty_hint: Opening an empty folder for the first time still creates a vault — password must be at least {{count}} characters (or switch to Create new vault).
auth.folder_pick_unavailable: This environment cannot choose a vault folder.
auth.folder_pick_hint: Use the desktop app, or Chrome / Edge over HTTPS for folder access.
auth.display_name_needed: Enter a display name for this local profile.
auth.encryption_pw_short: Encryption password must be at least {{count}} characters.
auth.pw_mismatch: Password and confirmation do not match.
auth.folder_nonempty: That folder already has household data. Choose an empty folder, or use Unlock existing vault.
auth.vault_empty_pw_short: New vault files need a password of at least {{count}} characters, or use Create new vault.
auth.no_linked_folder: No folder linked. Choose a folder below.
auth.create_wrong_screen: Use Choose empty folder to create a vault, or switch to Unlock existing.
auth.cloud_disabled: Cloud login is not set up yet. Stay on local, or configure VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to enable syncing to your host.
auth.cloud_not_configured: Cloud login is not configured (set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY).
auth.try_demo_hint: Loads sample people, accounts, recurring flows, periods, loans, benefits, tax profiles, and a baseline projection scenario — entirely in browser memory.
auth.demo_failed: Could not load the demo dataset.

settings.accountSubtitle: Link your sign-in to an adult profile and edit household name.
settings.cloudPwNote: Password and email changes use your cloud account (use recovery from the sign-in screen when available).
settings.localPwNote_web: Local vault sign-in is separate from cloud. Use Sync to cloud if you want this household in cloud storage too.
settings.localPwNote_desktop: This desktop app stores data only in your local encrypted file.
settings.no_adults_hint: No adults yet. Add one under Data & Settings → People & companies.
settings.language_hint: Applies immediately to menus and screens that have translations.
settings.folder_pick_error: This browser cannot pick a folder for file storage. Use Chrome or Edge, or the desktop app.
settings.folder_denied_short: Read/write permission for that folder was denied.
settings.no_folder_linked: No folder linked for file storage.
settings.about_blurb: A local-first household modelling dashboard. Prefer the Purchase link if you wish to acknowledge maintenance time.
settings.demo_mode_storage_note: Preview mode uses the onboard sample dataset. Nothing is saved to your disk or cloud.
settings.demo_mode_storage_hint: Log out when you finish exploring, then unlock or sign in as usual.
